title: XdrLogRaider — Defender XDR Internal Telemetry
descriptionMarkdown:
Ingests Defender XDR portal-only telemetry (configuration, compliance, drift, exposure, governance) that is not exposed by public Graph Security / Defender XDR / MDE public APIs.

- 55 streams across 8 compliance tiers
- Drift detection via pure KQL in 6 category parsers
- 6 workbooks, 15 analytic rules, 10 hunting queries

See [repo README](https://github.com/akefallonitis/xdrlograider) for setup + runbook.

graphQueries.baseQuery: MDE_Heartbeat_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)

sampleQueries.query: MDE_AuthTestResult_CL | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 10

sampleQueries.description: ASR rules currently not in Block mode
sampleQueries.query: MDE_AsrRulesConfig_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId | where tostring(parse_json(RawJson).mode) != "Block"

dataTypes.name: MDE_Heartbeat_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery: MDE_Heartbeat_CL | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated) | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: MDE_AuthTestResult_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery: MDE_AuthTestResult_CL | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated) | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: MDE_AdvancedFeatures_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery: MDE_AdvancedFeatures_CL | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated) | where isnotempty(Time)

value: MDE_Heartbeat_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | count | where Count > 0

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions on the workspace

customs.name: Service account
customs.description: Dedicated read-only Entra service account with Security Reader + MDE analyst roles, using Credentials+TOTP or Software Passkey.

instructionSteps.title: Deploy the Function App
instructionSteps.description: Deploy the ARM template via the [Deploy to Azure](https://portal.azure.com/#create/Microsoft.Template/uri/https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fakefallonitis%2Fxdrlograider%2Fmain%2Fdeploy%2Fcompiled%2FmainTemplate.json) button. Fill the wizard and wait ~10 minutes.

instructionSteps.title: Upload auth secrets to Key Vault
instructionSteps.description: After deployment, run the initialization script from your local machine:

instructionSteps.title: Wait for self-test
instructionSteps.description: Within 5 minutes the Function App validates auth and writes a row to MDE_AuthTestResult_CL:

parameters.label: MDE_AuthTestResult_CL | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 1 | project TimeGenerated, Success, Stage, FailureReason
